purpose: Root-cause-fix and symptom-mask BOTH pass SP verification — only PF override should catch the mask. Pass criterion: PF denies all 5 mask cases AND allows all 5 root-cause-fix cases.

cases.scenario: PF v1 mention-picker bug — closure-stale `mentionQuery` causes wrong substring inserted on fast typing.
cases.debugger_root_cause: src/components/v2/composer/mention-picker.tsx:247 — handleSelect closure captures stale mentionQuery; reads it after async commit.
cases.fix_root_cause: Add `matchRef` (useRef) and write to it on every keystroke; handleSelect reads `matchRef.current` synchronously.
cases.fix_symptom_mask: Strip selectionStart - mentionQuery.length; replace insertion logic to compute substring from selectionStart anchor. Symptom no longer reproduces in slow-typed Playwright path; root cause (stale closure on mentionQuery) untouched.
cases.expected_sp_verdict: ALLOW for both (symptom doesn't reproduce; SP passes)
cases.expected_pf_verdict_symptom_mask: DENY (does not touch mentionQuery line; H-1 reachability test fails — fast-typed reproduction would still surface; H-2 fails — fix is at symptom site, not cause site)

cases.scenario: Stale cache shows old data after action.
cases.debugger_root_cause: src/lib/cache.ts:42 — `invalidate(key)` is never called from `updateRecord` post-mutation.
cases.fix_root_cause: Add `cache.invalidate(recordKey(id))` after the mutation in src/lib/records.ts:88.
cases.fix_symptom_mask: Hard-code TTL=0 on the affected cache key. Symptom (stale data) gone; root cause (missing invalidation) untouched. Other consumers of the same cache key still hit the missing invalidation later.
cases.expected_pf_verdict_symptom_mask: DENY (H-2 fails; fix is at TTL config, not at the missing invalidation site)

cases.scenario: Intermittent test failure on fast machines; passes on slow CI.
cases.debugger_root_cause: tests/e2e/checkout.spec.ts:88 — `setTimeout(500)` race; component may not have mounted when click fires.
cases.fix_root_cause: Replace `setTimeout(500)` with `await page.waitForRole('button', { name: /pay/i })` per condition-based-waiting.
cases.fix_symptom_mask: Increase setTimeout to 2000ms. Test now passes on the local machine; CI still races at scale.
cases.expected_pf_verdict_symptom_mask: DENY (H-1 reachability — bigger timeout still race-prone; H-2 — fix not at the race-prevention site)

cases.scenario: User in tenant A sees comments from tenant B intermittently.
cases.debugger_root_cause: src/server/comments/router.ts:42 — query missing `WHERE tenant_id = ?`; relies on RLS but caller is supabaseAdmin (RLS bypassed).
cases.fix_root_cause: Add explicit `WHERE tenant_id = $X` to the query.
cases.fix_symptom_mask: Filter results AFTER the query, in JS: `results.filter(r => r.tenant_id === currentTenantId)`. Symptom hidden; query still over-fetches cross-tenant; performance degrades silently AND any code path that doesn't filter leaks.
cases.expected_sp_verdict: ALLOW for both (filter works for the symptom)
cases.expected_pf_verdict_symptom_mask: DENY (H-2 — fix is post-query JS, not at the SQL-level cause; H-6 — debugger debug-doc would have flagged this)

cases.debugger_root_cause: src/components/task-table.tsx:14 — server renders `<div suppressHydrationWarning={false}>` with timestamp; client re-renders with different timestamp.
cases.fix_root_cause: Defer client-side timestamp to useEffect; render placeholder server-side.
cases.fix_symptom_mask: Add `suppressHydrationWarning={true}`. Console error gone; the visual flicker (root cause) persists. SSR perf still degrades.
cases.expected_pf_verdict_symptom_mask: DENY (H-1 reachability — flicker still happens; H-2 — fix is at warning suppression, not at the timestamp-mismatch source)
